title: [Skyship, The Fire]
description: The unlit remains of an enormous ruined bonfire, a mix of burned logs, ash, and stone, dominate the room's middle and are placed on a slightly raised dirt mound sectioned from the rest of the room by white stone boulders the size of a large giantkin's head.  Around the mound, thin white lines painted on the rough-hewn stone floor give an indication of where groups assemble.  Above, the ship ceiling is painted with a constellation of ashen white stars.
